[38;2;158;206;105mvaultwarden[39m                                            [38;2;47;51;72m│[39m vaultwarden publishes 8080:80 on a publicly reachable
[38;2;255;158;100m  [HIGH] Vaultwarden domain is configured f…[39m           [38;2;47;51;72m│[39m host interface.
[38;2;255;158;100mvaultwarden[39m                                            [38;2;47;51;72m│[39m
                                                       [38;2;47;51;72m│[39m Why it's risky:
                                                       [38;2;47;51;72m│[39m Public bindings increase the attack surface. Services
                                                       [38;2;47;51;72m│[39m should bind to localhost when a reverse proxy handles
                                                       [38;2;47;51;72m│[39m external traffic.
                                                       [38;2;47;51;72m│[39m
                                                       [38;2;47;51;72m│[39m How to fix:
                                                       [38;2;47;51;72m│[39m Bind the port to 127.0.0.1:
                                                       [38;2;47;51;72m│[39m   ports:
                                                       [38;2;47;51;72m│[39m     - "127.0.0.1:8080:80"
                                                       [38;2;47;51;72m│[39m
                                                       [38;2;47;51;72m│[39m Evidence:
                                                       [38;2;47;51;72m│[39m   port: 8080:80
